title: Miniprep assisted proteomics (MAP) for rapid proteomics sample preparation.
author: Mousseau CB Pierre CA Hu DD Champion MM
content: S-EPMC9933840 PMC9933840 Miniprep assisted proteomics (MAP) for rapid proteomics sample preparation. Complete enzymatic digestion of proteins for bottom-up proteomics is substantially improved by use of detergents for denaturation and solubilization. Detergents however, are incompatible with many
